isAllowEmpty() - Method in class io.forja.components.buttonsAndActions.fxButtonGroup.FxButtonGroup
Returns whether the group can have no selection.
isAnimating() - Method in class io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxSkeleton.FxSkeleton
Returns whether the shimmer animation is running.
isAutoAdvancing() - Method in class io.forja.components.dataDisplay.fxCarousel.FxCarousel
Returns whether auto-advance is running.
isAutoResize() - Method in class io.forja.components.inputs.fxTextArea.FxTextArea
Returns whether auto-resize is enabled.
isCaseSensitive() - Method in class io.forja.components.utilities.fxSearchHighlight.FxSearchHighlight
Returns whether matching is case-sensitive.
isClearable() - Method in class io.forja.components.inputs.fxSearchField.FxSearchField
Returns whether the clear-icon shows when text is present.
isConfirmed() - Method in class io.forja.components.overlays.fxConfirmDialog.FxConfirmDialog
Returns whether confirm was clicked.
isConfirming() - Method in class io.forja.components.buttonsAndActions.fxCopyButton.FxCopyButton
Returns whether the confirmation flash is currently visible.
isDigitsOnly() - Method in class io.forja.components.inputs.fxOTPInput.FxOTPInput
Returns whether input is restricted to digits.
isDismissed() - Method in class io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxAlert.FxAlert
Returns whether the alert is currently hidden.
isDismissed() - Method in class io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxBanner.FxBanner
Returns whether the banner is currently hidden.
